requirement_topic.en: INNORPI Standards Route and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence

summary.en: INNORPI is Tunisia's national standards and conformity body. For stationary lithium BESS, the official public material reviewed did not identify a single Tunisia-only compulsory BESS product certificate. IEC 62619:2022 battery safety evidence and relevant IEC 62933 electrical-energy-storage-system evidence should be treated as likely technical evidence for standards, tender, owner, insurer, lender, customs, or project review unless INNORPI, a legal instrument, or a contract expressly makes a specific Tunisian or IEC edition mandatory.
summary.zh: INNORPI是突尼斯国家标准和合格评定机构。针对固定式锂电BESS，已审阅的官方公开材料未识别到单一的突尼斯专用强制BESS产品证书。因此，IEC 62619:2022电池安全证据及相关IEC 62933电能储能系统证据应作为标准、招标、业主、保险方、贷款方、海关或项目审查中可能需要的技术证据处理，除非INNORPI、法律文件或合同明确将某一突尼斯或IEC版本列为强制要求。
summary.zht: INNORPI是突尼西亞國家標準和合格評定機構。針對固定式鋰電BESS，已審閱的官方公開材料未識別到單一的突尼西亞專用強制BESS產品證書。因此，IEC 62619:2022電池安全證據及相關IEC 62933電能儲能系統證據應作為標準、招標、業主、保險方、貸款方、海關或項目審查中可能需要的技術證據處理，除非INNORPI、法律文件或合同明確將某一突尼西亞或IEC版本列為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: INNORPI national standardization and conformity assessment services
IEC 62933 series, including safety and system requirements where applicable

summary.en: China BESS files commonly include GB 44240-2024 for electrochemical energy-storage station safety and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage. These can support a technical comparison but should not be assumed to replace IEC-numbered reports or Tunisia acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024电化学储能电站安全要求和GB/T 36276-2023电力储能用锂离子电池。这些文件可支持技术对照，但不应假定可替代IEC编号报告或突尼斯接受结论。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024電化學儲能電站安全要求和GB/T 36276-2023電力儲能用鋰離子電池。這些文件可支持技術對照，但不應假定可替代IEC編號報告或突尼西亞接受結論。

gap.en: Prepare an English or French clause matrix mapping GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 to IEC 62619:2022 and the relevant IEC 62933 parts. Clearly separate formal IEC test reports from China-only GB reports, and confirm with INNORPI, customs, or the project owner whether IEC evidence is mandatory for the exact HS codes and project route.
gap.zh: 应准备英文或法文条款矩阵，将GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023映射至IEC 62619:2022及相关IEC 62933部分。应清楚区分正式IEC测试报告与仅中国GB报告，并与INNORPI、海关或项目业主确认具体HS编码和项目路径是否强制要求IEC证据。
gap.zht: 應準備英文或法文條款矩陣，將GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023映射至IEC 62619:2022及相關IEC 62933部分。應清楚區分正式IEC測試報告與僅中國GB報告，並與INNORPI、海關或項目業主確認具體HS編碼和項目路徑是否強制要求IEC證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific or mandatory only where INNORPI, customs, tender, insurer, lender, owner, utility, permit, or contract calls up the standard or conformity route
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended unless incorporated by regulation or contract

source.publisher: Institut National de la Normalisation et de la Propriété Industrielle (INNORPI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat China GB reports as automatic Tunisia acceptance. Confirm the INNORPI / project route and provide IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence where it is called up.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB报告视为自动获得突尼斯接受。应确认INNORPI/项目路径，并在被要求时提供IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB報告視為自動獲得突尼西亞接受。應確認INNORPI／項目路徑，並在被要求時提供IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據。
